title: Caesar Salad
description: A crisp Romaine lettuce salad tossed with a classic creamy Caesar dressing, croutons, and Parmesan.
steps: Wash, dry, and tear the Romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, toss the lettuce with Caesar dressing to coat evenly.
Add croutons and half of the Parmesan cheese, gently tossing again.
Top with remaining Parmesan, a squeeze of lemon juice, and black pepper.
seoTitle: Caesar Salad Recipe - Best Italian Festival Recipes

cookingTips: For the best Caesar Salad, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Caesar Salad ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
